name: ClassificationStateStore
description: Owner-only raw-SQLite schema, migrations, idempotency, guarded state transitions, abandonment tombstones, cleanup events, and recognized-artifact policy.
schema_def: classify_store_meta(schema_version, store_id, created_at); operation_idempotency(idempotency_key PK, operation_id, contract_version, request_fingerprint, terminal_result, created_at); active_normalization(singleton PK, normalization_version, activation_epoch); abandonment_tombstone(tombstone_id PK, subject_type, subject_id, reason, actor, abandoned_at, removed_payload_count); cleanup_event(cleanup_id PK, policy_version, recognized_removed_count, expired_preview_count, abandoned_payload_count, actor, occurred_at); immutable-table UPDATE and DELETE guards; mutable run transitions require expected prior state; SQLite foreign_keys ON, WAL, synchronous FULL, bounded busy handling, user_version migrations
